properties.name: Datawiza - massive errors detected
properties.description: "This rule is designed to identify when the system is experiencing abnormal errors."
properties.query:
let timeFrame = 10m;
datawizaserveraccess_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(timeFrame) .. now())
  and Status_d >= 500
| summarize Count = count()
| where Count > 100

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Detected {{Count}} errors within 10 minutes. Please investigate unauthorized access attempts or misconfigurations.
